creator: ganael.laplanche@martymac.com
text:
This patch updates net/grsync to v0.6.3.

From Changelog :

Version 0.6.3
        Fixed regression bug "rsync output always open"
        Fixed crash on import session
        Made rsync output faster by scrolling to end of text box just every
        second instead of every line

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
